title: Device Request - 10G 4 in 1 human motionsensor  - _TZE200_rhgsbacq / TS0601

diagComments.excerpt:
## ✅ Already Supported in dlnraja Fork v5.5.991

The **10G 4-in-1 Human Motion Sensor** (_TZE200_rhgsbacq / TS0601) is fully supported!

### Driver: presence_sensor_radar
- **mmWave radar** detection
- **Temperature & Humidity** sensors
- **Illuminance** (lux) measurement
- Smart distance auto-detection

### Configuration: HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI
- DP101 = Humidity
- DP111 = Temperature
- DP mappings auto-discovered

🔗 Install **Universal Tuya Zigbee** from Homey App Store
